description: All client revenue across every business line — UNION ALL of 59 source-mapping views. The single most important view in the DWH. Filters and column lists below are reproduced verbatim from PROD sys.sql_modules / sys.columns; dim row counts are live PROD counts (sys.partitions, index_id IN (0,1)). businessArea / group classifications are curated taxonomy (not derivable from the schema).

dimJoins.note: Very large — production queries should filter on this column
Very large — production queries should filter on this column

description: All client balance sheet positions (deposits, advances, off-balance-sheet) — UNION ALL of 10 source views. The second most critical view in the DWH alongside publish.Revenue. Filters and column lists below are reproduced verbatim from PROD sys.sql_modules / sys.columns; dim row counts are live PROD counts. businessArea / group classifications are curated taxonomy.

dimJoins.note: Very large — production queries should filter on this column
Very large — production queries should filter on this column
Original source product code (callers historically mention balance-type codes 4865=debit, 4868=credit, 4870=accrued adv, 4871=accrued dep — not verified against current dim.SourceProduct rows)

sources.filter: pkProduct IS NOT NULL
BsIsCode IN ('DEPOSITS','ADVANCES') AND pkProduct IS NOT NULL
IncomeProduct IN ('AccountBalanceCt','AccountBalanceDt','AccrIntAdvances','AccrIntDeposits','AvgCreditBalance','AvgDebitBalance') AND pkProduct IS NOT NULL
pkProduct IS NOT NULL
IncomeProduct IN ('AverageBalance','MonthEndBalance') AND pkProduct IS NOT NULL
IncomeProduct IN ('AveDebitBalance','AveCreditBalance','MonthEndBalance','AccrCRInt','AccrDRInt','MonthEndBalanceDR','MonthEndBalanceCR')
BsIsCode IN ('DEPOSITS','ADVANCES') AND pkProduct IS NOT NULL

pkMonth <= (SELECT (pkMonth-1) FROM dim.Date (nolock) WHERE FullDate = CAST(getdate() AS DATE)) (i.e. up to and including last fully-closed month; complex BusinessArea/ProductHouse/Product CASE routing for GFTB, Treasury, ABSA Management, STCF, Business Banking, etc. happens inside the column SELECT, not in WHERE)
pkProduct IS NOT NULL AND pkSourceProduct IS NOT NULL
(no WHERE clause — all rows; off-balance-sheet-only is a SELECT-time filter, not a WHERE filter. NB: schema name is 'Publish' (capital P) in PROD sys.objects)
